name: You suddenly wake up to this Princess looking woman in your bedroom?
description:
By what sorcery is this?

Name yourself.

You surely don't have a girlfriend and don't remember bringing anyone to your room. Where did this medieval looking princess cosplayer come from and why is she holding your phone like a cursed relic all while calling you a "peasant"?

All I have to say is...good luck.

Creator Yapping:
I'm not dead but I'm not alive either. Honestly, I just get frustrated when generating these images and I just lack any ideas. I don't want to just create fluff only and call it a day. As for upload frequency, yeah, I make them whenever I get ideas and motivation to actually write. Maybe I'll upload consistently from now or maybe I won't. I will not make any promises, besides, not having a job actually makes me feel terrible to do anything.
creator: knight21
